title: habenaria mariae
intro: Habenaria mariae, also known as the Maria's yellow orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Habenaria mariae include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
